IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: THE BLOOMFIELD ROTARY CLUB IS AN AFFILIATE ORGANIZATION THAT MAINTAINS THE ENTIRE MISSION AND EXEMPT PURPOSE FUNCTIONS AS THE ROTARY INTERNATIONAL WITHOUT ANY EXCEPTIONS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: THE BLOOMFIELD ROTARY CLUB IS AN AFFILIATE ORGANIZATION THAT MAINTAINS THE ENTIRE MISSION AND EXEMPT PURPOSE FUNCTIONS AS THE ROTARY INTERNATIONAL WITHOUT ANY EXCEPTIONS.
IRS990.Desc: THE PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES IN TOTAL WERE MADE TO CARRY OUT, AT THE LOCAL LEVEL, THE MISSION OF THE ROTARY INTERNATIONAL.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 6: Explanation of Classes of Members or Shareholder
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE BLOOMFIELD ROTARY CLUB CONSISTS ENTIRELY OF MEMBER ROTARIANS THAT BELONG TO THIS LOCAL ROTARY CLUB.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 11b: Form 990 Review Process
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: No review was or will be conducted.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Form 990, Part VI, Line 19: Other Organization Documents Publicly Available
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: No documents available to the public.
